title: CommandRotator
description: the mod allows you to rotate anywhere using the command
body:
# RotateToPoint 
is a simple and powerful utility mod that allows you to instantly rotate your camera toward any given position in the world.
It is especially useful for builders, mapmakers, command creators, and players who need precise camera orientation.

The mod adds a single command that lets you rotate toward coordinates or directional vectors taken from the F3 screen.
The symbol ~ keeps your current rotation on that axis, allowing you to adjust only the values you want.

## Features

• Rotate your view to any coordinate or direction
• Uses F3 debug screen values for accurate rotation
• Supports the tilde (~) to preserve current yaw or pitch
• Lightweight and easy to use
• Works on Fabric for Minecraft versions 1.20.1–1.21.8
• Useful for building, cinematics, commands, and automation

### Command Usage


```
/rotate <first point> <second point>
```


Examples:

```
/rotate 100 64 200 ~ – rotate only yaw toward a point
```


```
/rotate ~ ~ 100 70 200 – rotate yaw and pitch toward a target
```


```
/rotate ~45 ~30 – rotate to a direction instead of coordinates
```
